{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/anthropic-vacancies/beneficial-deployments-concept/07-section-7-success-metrics.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Section 7: Success metrics"
tags:
  * roadmap
  * anthropic
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Section 7: Success metrics


{quote}> Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 с{quote}

----





{quote}Источник: MHTML‑снимок {{Вакансии в Anthropic по кластерам - Claude}} (корень репозитория). Раздел диалога — Variant C: написание concept document для Anthropic Beneficial Deployments outreach (8–15 страниц).{quote}

Section 7: Success metrics

Concrete:

Cases processed: target 50/year by end Phase 1

Time saved per case: target 60% reduction in document preparation time

Quality: target 95% accuracy on legal citations

Vulnerable individuals reached: target X newly accessible cases (those who couldn't afford traditional advocate)

Advocate capacity multiplier: target 2-3x increase in cases each advocate can handle

Pattern library growth: target N reusable case patterns by Phase 2



----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[04-section-4-sgb-pilot]]
* [[02-section-2-beneficial-dimension]]
* [[01-section-1-problem]]
* [[08-section-8-risks-mitigations]]




----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[04-section-4-sgb-pilot]] (сходство 0.33)
* [[02-section-2-beneficial-dimension]] (сходство 0.32)
* [[01-section-1-problem]] (сходство 0.30)
